description: Gull-shaped bird, gray wings, dark "stripe" of feathers through gray wing from carpal across secondary coverts. Body and head white, dark spot behind eye more crescent-like than spot. Dark eyes, dark bill. Dark collar in nape continues around side of neck. Dark tip to tail.Behaviors: Bird spent entire time of observation floating on surface of the lake. Never saw it fly or get up at all.Call: nonePlumage: juvenile
photographer: Photographer: Randy Hancock, Randy Hancock, Randy Hancock
